title: Sqlitelogictest crash in a IN query (8th)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test A', 10.5), (2, 'Test B', NULL), (3, 'Test C', 20.0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (0 + id);
key_bug_features: IN query with invalid syntax causes crash
